title: CI: schema validation + PII-redaction check scaffold
context: CI must enforce the two earliest hard gates: every eligibility record validates against the schema, and no investigator/contact PII leaks into the dataset. This scaffold runs from a clean clone and fails the build on any invalid record or detected PII field. It depends on the schema design (001).
objective: Scaffold CI that runs AJV schema validation over all eligibility records and a PII-redaction check that fails the build if any investigator/contact field is present.
acceptanceCriteria: CI runs AJV (draft-07) validation against the eligibility schema on every PR and fails on any invalid record.
PII-redaction check scans records for investigator/contact fields (names, emails, phone) and fails the build if any are present.
Pipeline runs reproducibly from a clean clone; CI configuration documented.
No secrets or tokens are written to logs.
